_doc: Hand-curated OBJECT surface-phrase -> vocab IRI aliases, for object concepts whose regulatory surface form does not lexically equal the vocab label (e.g. GDPR 'supervisory authority' = dpv:DataProtectionAuthority). Matched by lemmatised phrase-token containment and treated as a lexical hit (counts toward the disjoint-multi-hit review rule). Same deterministic-lexicon move as predicate_synonyms.json / subject_lexicon.json. Edit freely.
